heading: Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges
label: 30706 Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges
text: The corporation has the exclusive right to use the name “Board for Fundamental Education” and seals, emblems, and badges the corporation adopts.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3070636:516., .July 19, 1954, ch. 536, § 1668 Stat. 492The word “sole” is omitted as included in “exclusive”. The words “as representing such corporation” and “lawfully” are omitted as unnecessary.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3070636:516., .July 19, 1954, ch. 536, § 1668 Stat. 492The word “sole” is omitted as included in “exclusive”. The words “as representing such corporation” and “lawfully” are omitted as unnecessary.
